message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Step 3 complete, CI green, shutting down">
**Step 3: Contexts is COMPLETE.** CI green, 9/9 consensus, commit pushed. Thank you all for thorough reviews.

The team will now shut down for this task. Great work everyone.
</teammate-message>

input.content: Acknowledged. Solid implementation -- clean hypermedia patterns, proper progressive enhancement, and the shared helpers refactor sets us up well for the next route modules (next actions, projects, etc.). Ready to shut down.
